center.name: 卡比利亚
center.summary: 卡比利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括阿爾及利亞鳾，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits certain areas of Kabylia, where it has been recorded in five localities isolated from each other by deforested areas unsuitable for its survival. It was first discovered on Mount Babor, only about from the Mediterranean coast
